channel.title: Tools
channel.description: How to Remove Formatting From Ebook Highlights With Vim Removing extra stuff from Bookfusion and Foliate exported highlights Calibre Web with Docker and NGINX Setting up your own Calibre Web server using Docker and NGINX You Need to Learn Man Pages You need to be using man pages. Here is how. A short guide to using Man Pages Proxmox PfSense HaProxy Setup Access Proxmox PVE GUI through HaProxy on PfSense Calibre Web with Docker and NGINX Setting up your own Calibre Web server using Docker and NGINX How to Build a website With Hugo Guide for setting up a static website with Hugo How to Process Bookfusion Highlights with Vim Removing extra stuff from Bookfusion exported highlights How to Set Up Hugo Relearn Theme Hugo Relearn setup guide Learning Touch Typing Learning touch typing Nextcloud on RHEL Based Systems Nextcloud setup guide on a RHEL based server Self hosting a Nextcloud Server Self hosting a Nextcloud server Vim Guide Guide to using Vim
